info.title: Apstory.TypescriptCodeGen.Swagger
info.description: Typescript code generator, generating typescript models and api service calls from a swagger.json file

options.name: --Url
options.description: The base url of the swagger api endpoint

options.name: --Version
options.description: The version of the swagger api endpoint

options.name: --Group
options.description: The group name of the swagger api endpoint (automatically generated from version if left blank)

options.name: --ExportFile
options.description: A .ts file that lists all generated files

options.name: --CachingFile
options.description: A .txt file that lists all caching instructions in the format: '[Service Name]:[Version]:[Caching Category]:[Duration In Minutes]?:[Caches To Expire on Post/Put/Delete]'

options.name: --AppendModel
options.description: Appends generated typescript models with supplied value (Useful for offline fields)
